content:
▎海，黑洞般幽邃，諾第留斯號正向更深處行駛著。
——駛向深海、駛向絕望。
恐懼、譫妄、死亡……都將被這片死寂吞沒。

▎領航旗幟殘破鮮紅，她立於船頭：「我必會將船隻，引領向正確的航向。」
——駛向深海、駛向希望。
嶄新的航向！偉大神國絕非幻夢！

——◆——◆—— ◆ 🚩 ◆ ——◆——◆——

▎The sea, black hole-like in its abyssal darkness. The Nautilus sails ever deeper.
——Deeper into the abyss, deeper into despair. 
Fear, delirium, death... all shall be devoured by this lifeless silence.

▎Beneath tattered crimson banners, she stands at the prow: "I will steer this vessel onto the rightful course."
——Deeper into the abyss, deeper into hope. 
A new voyage! The glorious divine realm—no illusory dream!
thread_title: 喚醒體爆料：溟海領航┊Awaker Revelations: Navigating the Abyssal Seas
